subject: physics
title: 18M.1.SL.TZ2.5
question_html:
The graph shows the variation with time t of the force F acting on an object of mass 15 000 kg.

The object is at rest at t = 0.

What is the speed of the object when t = 30 s?

A.     0.18 m s–1

B.     6 m s–1

C.     12 m s–1

D.     180 m s–1
